mapper.delete: DELETE FROM VX_Moment_friendCircle WHERE create_time > CONVERT(varchar(45), GETDATE()-1, 23)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO VX_Moment_friendCircle (moment_id, creator, create_time, create_type, createtime, content) VALUES
(#{item.momentId}, #{item.creator}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.createType}, GETDATE(), #{item.content})
